description: Represents an AWS CodeBuild build batch, which is a single execution of a batch build for a project.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the batch build.

BuildBatchNumber.description: The number of the batch build.

BuildBatchStatus.description: The current status of the batch build.

BuildTimeoutInMinutes.description: How long, in minutes, for CodeBuild to wait before timing out the batch build.

Complete.description: Whether the batch build is complete.

CurrentPhase.description: The current build phase of the batch build.

EncryptionKey.description: The KMS key used to encrypt the batch build output artifacts.

Id.description: The unique ID for the batch build.

Initiator.description: The entity that started the batch build.

ProjectName.description: The name of the CodeBuild build project.

QueuedTimeoutInMinutes.description: The number of minutes a batch build is allowed to be queued before it times out.

StartTime.description: When the batch build started, in ISO 8601 format.
